title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.722 - Acceleration of students, subject or whole grade, when
text:
162.722.  Acceleration of students, subject or whole grade, when. — 1.  Each school district shall establish a policy, approved by the board of education of the district, that allows acceleration for students who demonstrate:
  (1)  Advanced performance or potential for advanced performance; and
  (2)  The social and emotional readiness for acceleration.
  2.  The policy shall allow, for students described in this section, at least the following types of acceleration:
  (1)  Subject acceleration; and
  (2)  Whole grade acceleration.
(L. 2018 H.B. 1606 merged with S.B. 743)
